sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39717" key="e)pikiqa/risma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικῐθάρισμα</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰρ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n39717.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">piece performed after a play</tr_>, Tertull. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Valent.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
